textByHash.0dcaecdd7c2436991cf9d929b3f5a2300a2e151a: The blood is the blood of Kourend's citizens. It is fitting that we honour their memory.
textByHash.14971fd15dc2cd0fced9cd8ff2e80d52346b15d8: Some were slain by the deadly creatures that roam the land; others perished at the hands of their fellow citizens during the wars of this land.
textByHash.27853141673734e30019d3753f65d8dfcc105027: Throughout the generations, countless people of this land have perished in times of strife, with their bodies left to rot where they fell.
textByHash.68db72dc8e78714169fc4b6557da8b264803a32f: So much blood flows through these lands.
textByHash.8e11a8419cd47cfb68915291843bea8672c817d0: Their blood flowed into the soil, pooling and percolating unseen in the dark, as the power of the Altar drew it to this sacred place to form the River.
